metadata.description: 自定义异常: English translation: ```python class MyError(Exception): pass # A custom exception. ``` This Python code defines a custom exception called `MyError` that inherits from the base `Exception` class. The `pass` statement indicates that this exception class does not implement any additional methods or properties beyond what is provided by the base `Exception` class.

data_pointers.title: 自定义异常
